query: Replace the AnimateDiff motion module with a more recent v3 variant and restructure the pipeline to include a ControlNet stage for pose-guided animation as a conditioning input instead of relying solely on the base animatediff temporal module. Keep the face swapping, deflicker, and ICLight stages intact.

desired.outcome: The workflow now uses ControlNet for pose-conditioned video generation alongside an updated motion module, with the original face-swap, deflicker, and relighting stages still functional.
desired.quality: All new nodes are fully wired, no dangling connections, the video outputs correctly, and the existing downstream stages receive the proper latent input.

_tags.author_rationale: This forces a model backbone swap plus addition of a control stage, testing deep structural editing specific to the workflow's AnimateDiff/ControlNet domain.
